calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Mar-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marlene Getchell appeared by zoom for Amy Swanson (Successor Trustee).

The Court noted that a heggstad petition is before it and stated that prior to December 1996 Byron and Gayle owned the property together and then a deed was recorded listing the property as separate property. Ms. Getchell stated that she thinks it was done for a refinance. The Court then stated that in June 2001 Byron and Gayle created pour-over wills, that the next month a trust was created which listed the property as community property and questions who prepared the joint tenant's deed. Ms. Getchell stated that she does not know who created the deed. The Court stated that there is convincing evidence of the Settlors intent that the real property be an asset of the trust and that there are instruments that provided that the property is an asset of the trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Verified Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Feb-23-2021 Continued To Mar-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
